hotelProfile.description:
Hotel Sandhya Grand & Marriage Hall offers the perfect blend of comfort and convenience in the heart of Munger. The property features 23 spacious rooms, including 17 air-conditioned rooms, designed to provide a relaxing stay for both leisure and business travelers.

Guests can enjoy modern in-room facilities such as TV, sofa seating, complimentary Wi-Fi, and room service.

The hotel is equipped with a range of amenities including:

🍽️ In-house Restaurant serving delicious meals

🅿️ Ample Parking Space for guests

🧺 Laundry Service

📶 Free Wi-Fi across the property

🛗 Lift/Elevator access for convenience

Alongside its accommodation, the property houses a well-designed marriage hall and banquet facility, making it an excellent choice for weddings, receptions, family gatherings, and social events.

With its comfortable lodging, event hosting facilities, and essential amenities under one roof, Hotel Sandhya Grand & Marriage Hall stands out as a trusted venue for both travelers and celebrations in Munger.

categories.name: Premium Plus
categories.description: Premium Plus with enhanced luxury features

departments.name: Housekeeping
departments.description: The Housekeeping Department maintains the cleanliness, hygiene, and comfort of all guest rooms and public areas. It ensures high standards of presentation, timely room turnovers, and supports event setups for marriage functions and banquets.

departments.name: F & B Service
departments.description: The F&B Service Department oversees all dining areas, banquets, and room service operations. The team ensures exceptional service quality, menu presentation, and guest satisfaction during meals, events, and special occasions.

departments.name: Front Office
departments.description: The Front Office is the first point of contact for guests, managing reservations, check-ins, check-outs, and guest queries. The team ensures a warm welcome and seamless guest experience, while maintaining accurate records and room status coordination.

departments.name: Admin
departments.description: he Admin Department ensures the smooth functioning of all hotel operations. It manages official documentation, vendor coordination, licensing, and communication between departments. It supports management in decision-making, compliance, and maintaining service standards across the property.

departments.name: Kitchen
departments.description: The Kitchen Department is responsible for preparing delicious and hygienic dishes for restaurants, banquets, and room service. It ensures consistent food quality, menu planning, inventory control, and coordination with F&B service for timely delivery.

rooms.description:
Enjoy a clean, cozy stay in our Deluxe Double Room, featuring a comfortable double bed, modern décor, and soothing warm lighting. The room includes AC, flat-screen TV, and stylish interiors with plants for a refreshing touch.

The attached bathroom offers a geyser, western toilet, washbasin, and shower, ensuring comfort and hygiene. Perfect for couples or families seeking a peaceful, relaxing experience.

Experience a relaxing stay in our Deluxe Double Room, thoughtfully designed for guests who appreciate comfort and modern style. This spacious room features a comfortable double bed with soft pillows and clean linens, complemented by tasteful décor and soothing wall textures that create a peaceful atmosphere.

The attached private bathroom is equipped with a geyser for hot water, western toilet, hand shower, and modern sanitary fittings—ensuring a refreshing and hygienic experience every time.

Relax and unwind in our Standard Double Room at Hotel Sandhya Grand & Marriage Hall, Bhagalpur. Thoughtfully designed for comfort and convenience, this room features a cozy double bed, fresh linens, and tasteful interiors that create a peaceful, home-like atmosphere.

The attached private bathroom includes a geyser for hot water, a western-style toilet, hand shower, and washbasin, ensuring hygiene and modern comfort for every guest. The room’s clean tiled walls and bright lighting make it ideal for both short and extended stays.

Experience a clean, cozy, and comfortable stay in our Deluxe Double Room featuring a spacious double bed with soft pillows and fresh linens. The room comes with an attached modern bathroom fitted with a shower, geyser, and essential toiletries. Enjoy a relaxing atmosphere with simple interiors, LED TV, and convenient amenities — perfect for couples or solo travelers seeking a peaceful stay.
Experience refined comfort in our Premium Deluxe Room featuring a plush double bed, modern bathroom, LED TV, and elegant interiors designed for ultimate relaxation.

Enjoy a clean, cozy stay in our Deluxe Double Room, featuring a comfortable double bed, modern décor, and soothing warm lighting. The room includes AC, flat-screen TV, and stylish interiors with plants for a refreshing touch.

The attached bathroom offers a geyser, western toilet, washbasin, and shower, ensuring comfort and hygiene. Perfect for couples or families seeking a peaceful, relaxing experience.

Spacious AC room with a large double bed, sofa seating, flat-screen TV, and elegant interiors. Attached private bathroom with geyser, shower, and modern fittings. Perfect for families, couples, and business travelers.

banquetHalls.name: Royal Pavilion
banquetHalls.description: A regal venue with traditional architecture and modern amenities. Features high ceilings, ornate decorations, and premium facilities for luxury events.

banquetHalls.name: Emerald Suite
banquetHalls.description: A cozy and elegant space with garden views and natural lighting. Perfect for intimate gatherings, birthday parties, and small corporate meetings.

banquetHalls.name: Crystal Hall
banquetHalls.description: An intimate yet spacious venue with contemporary design and state-of-the-art facilities. Ideal for corporate events, receptions, and medium-sized celebrations.

banquetHalls.name: Grand Ballroom
banquetHalls.description: Our flagship venue featuring elegant crystal chandeliers, marble flooring, and panoramic city views. Perfect for grand weddings, corporate galas, and large celebrations.

banquetHalls.name: Conference Center
banquetHalls.description: A modern conference facility designed for business meetings, seminars, and corporate training sessions. Features cutting-edge technology and professional ambiance.

housekeeping.notes: Room requires cleaning after guest checkout.
